meta.title: Best Auto Detailing in Austin | Shinny auto detailing
meta.description: Top-rated mobile auto detailing in Austin, TX. We come to you! Call (512) 555-0123 for a free quote today.

hero.headline: Premium Mobile Auto Detailing in Austin
hero.subheadline: We bring usage-grade detailing to your driveway. 500+ happy customers.

features.title: Mobile Service
features.desc: We come to your home or office. No waiting in line.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.desc: We don't leave until you're 100% happy with the shine.

services.title: Interior Detail
services.desc: Deep steam cleaning for carpets, seats, and mats. Leather conditioning and odor removal.

services.title: Exterior Wash & Wax
services.desc: Hand wash, clay bar treatment, and premium carnauba wax for a mirror finish.

services.title: Full Ceramic Coating
services.desc: Ultimate protection for your paint. Repels dirt and water for up to 3 years.

reviews.name: Sarah Jenkins
reviews.text: Best car wash I've ever had. They got stains out of my seats that had been there for years!

reviews.name: Mike Ross
reviews.text: Super convenient. I was working from home while they detailed my truck in the driveway. Looks brand new.

reviews.name: Emily Chen
reviews.text: Professional, on time, and great communication. Highly recommend Austin Auto Spa.

faq.question: Do I need to be home?
faq.answer: No, as long as we have access to the vehicle and keys if interior detail is needed.

faq.question: Do you need water or power?
faq.answer: We carry our own water and power, but access to an outlet is helpful for heavy-duty equipment.

faq.question: What areas do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve all of Austin and surrounding areas including Round Rock, Cedar Park, and Pflugerville.
